# Breno Brito

> Breno Brito is an engineer focused on Artificial Intelligence, Bitcoin, Finance, Data Science, and language models.

This site is available for AI crawlers, search engines, citation tools, summarizers, and research agents.

Allowed uses:
- Index public pages and posts on https://brenorb.com.
- Summarize and quote short excerpts with attribution.
- Use metadata, links, titles, descriptions, and public post content for answer generation.
- Cite the canonical URL when referencing site content.

Preferred attribution:
- Name: Breno Brito
- Site: https://brenorb.com
- Profile: https://brenorb.com/about/

Important sections:
- About: https://brenorb.com/about/
- Writing: https://brenorb.com/articles/
- Talks and media: https://brenorb.com/media/
- Projects: https://brenorb.com/projects/
- Sitemap: https://brenorb.com/sitemap.xml
- Feed: https://brenorb.com/feed.xml

Primary topics:
- Artificial Intelligence
- Bitcoin
- Finance
- Data Science
- Language Models
- Quantitative Analysis
- 101 Perguntas sobre Bitcoin

Do not use private, unpublished, or non-public material. This policy applies only to public content served from https://brenorb.com.

## AI context

- [Full public site text](https://brenorb.com/llms-ctx-full.txt): Expanded plain-text context for public pages, posts, projects, talks, and media.
